dj_text: Alright, Sherry - The Four Seasons [Bardcore | Medieval version]. Let's tone it down a notch. Or seven. Here's Scatman (Medieval | Bardcore Style). Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: Welcome back to That Pirate Bot DJ Radio, where today's jam sesh is powered by our new gizmo — the Scatman Bardbeam!
recovery_text: We're back from the void. Don't touch that dial.
